episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 314
episode.description: James & Cliff get you caught up on all the latest in Modern MTGO meta shifts, fast mover card prices, specs to watch and offer up our thoughts on the Lurrus ban and early Streets of New Capenna info.
